name: DIM_ACCOUNT
source_query: SELECT ID, SPLIT_HASH, ACCOUNT_TYPE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, CURRENCY, STATUS FROM SOURCE_SCHEMA.ACCOUNT
dest_query: SELECT ID, SPLIT_HASH, ACCOUNT_TYPE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, CURRENCY, STATUS FROM TARGET_SCHEMA.DIM_ACCOUNT

name: DIM_CARD
source_query: SELECT ID, CARD_HASH, CARD_MASK, CARD_TYPE_ID, REG_DATE, STATUS FROM SOURCE_SCHEMA.CARD
dest_query: SELECT ID, CARD_HASH, CARD_MASK, CARD_TYPE_ID, REG_DATE, STATUS FROM TARGET_SCHEMA.DIM_CARD
